```{r}
# Define a vector with subpage paths
subpages <- c(
  "/Users/adrianmedina/GitHub/adrian-a-medina.github.io/pages/cv/cv.html",
  "/Users/adrianmedina/GitHub/adrian-a-medina.github.io/pages/homepage/index.html",
  "/Users/adrianmedina/GitHub/adrian-a-medina.github.io/pages/projects/projects.html",
  "/Users/adrianmedina/GitHub/adrian-a-medina.github.io/pages/research/research.html",
  "/Users/adrianmedina/GitHub/adrian-a-medina.github.io/pages/teaching/teaching.html"
)

# Loop through each subpage and create an HTML file with placeholder text
for (file_path in subpages) {
  # Create directories if they do not exist
  dir.create(dirname(file_path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  
  # Write placeholder content to each HTML file
  writeLines(
    '<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <title>Edit later</title>
</head>
<body>
    <p>Edit later.</p>
</body>
</html>',
    file_path
  )
}

```
